leadText: The Swampertite (Japanese: ラグラージナイト Laglargenite) is a type of held item introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. It is the Mega Stone that allows Swampert to Mega Evolve into Mega Swampert.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Swampert , the Swampertite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Swampert if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Swampertite from Swampert. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Swampert, the Swampertite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Swampert when it performs a Spectacular Talent during a Pokémon Contest Spectacular if its Trainer has a Key Stone. Swampert will remain a Mega Swampert until the Talent Round ends. Any Pokémon holding a Swampertite in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire cannot be traded to Pokémon X and Y .

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Swampert , the Swampertite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Swampert if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Swampertite from Swampert.

Have Swampert hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. ZA One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. A Swampert holding this stone will be able to Mega Evolve during battle.
